case_title: MUSSIO GIANMARIA VS PROF. SECHI,SALVATORE-INSTITUTO ITALIANO DI CULTRA

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $621.00 FILED BY MUSSIO GIANMARIA AS TO DEFENDANT PROF. SECHI,SALVATORE-INSTITUTO ITALIANO DI CULTRA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-13-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
CERT. RECEIPT TO SALVATORE SECHI RETURNED SIGNED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-13-1993, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-27-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MUSSIO GIANMARIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PROF. SECHI,SALVATORE-INSTITUTO ITALIANO DI CULTRA DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE FOR LACK OF JURISDICTION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEF. REQUEST COURT TO ATTACH MOTION TO DISMISS IN FOLDER FOR JUDGE TO SEE ON TRIAL DATE.
